summary: Section formerly 4.5.4 is now 2.4 (V6 restructure). All curmudgeon-identified issues resolved in current text: (1) sun altitude corrected from 8537km to 5733km, (2) W021 smoking gun included (dome predicts moon diameter variation but omits sun), (3) refraction escape hatch addressed with quantitative burden (must match 1/cos(theta) to 0.01%), (4) SDO/HMI + Royal Observatory Greenwich citations added, (5) redundancy with old 4.8 resolved by cross-reference to 7.10. No further work needed.
